sqlCommand.descr: Delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0

Delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and cast(GL as varchar(7)) + cast(Co as varchar(4)) in (Select cast(x.GL as varchar(7)) + cast(x.Co as varchar(4)) from COAxCo x inner join Companies y on x.Co = y.Co where GL >= '1050000' and GL <= '1099800' and not x.Crcy = y.Crcy)
Delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and cast(Co as varchar(4)) + Crcy in (Select cast(Co as varchar(4)) + Crcy from Companies)
update TransX set Amt2 = 0, Amt3 = 0, Amt4 = 0, Amt5 = 0 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update x set Amt2 = y.Amt1 from TransX x inner join (Select KeyID,Flex3,Crcy,Co,GL,PC,UWYR,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = '0L' group by KeyID,Flex3,Crcy,Co,GL,PC,UWYR) y on x.KeyID = y.KeyID and x.Flex3 = y.Flex3 and x.Crcy = y.Crcy and x.Co = y.Co and x.GL = y.GL and x.PC = y.PC and x.UWYR = y.UWYR

update x set Amt3 = y.Amt1 from TransX x inner join (Select KeyID,Flex3,Crcy,Co,GL,PC,UWYR,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'IF' group by KeyID,Flex3,Crcy,Co,GL,PC,UWYR) y on x.KeyID = y.KeyID and x.Flex3 = y.Flex3 and x.Crcy = y.Crcy and x.Co = y.Co and x.GL = y.GL and x.PC = y.PC and x.UWYR = y.UWYR

update x set Amt4 = y.Amt1 from TransX x inner join (Select KeyID,Flex3,Crcy,Co,GL,PC,UWYR,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'UG' group by KeyID,Flex3,Crcy,Co,GL,PC,UWYR) y on x.KeyID = y.KeyID and x.Flex3 = y.Flex3 and x.Crcy = y.Crcy and x.Co = y.Co and x.GL = y.GL and x.PC = y.PC and x.UWYR = y.UWYR

update x set Amt5 = y.Amt1 from TransX x inner join (Select KeyID,Flex3,Crcy,Co,GL,PC,UWYR,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'US' group by KeyID,Flex3,Crcy,Co,GL,PC,UWYR) y on x.KeyID = y.KeyID and x.Flex3 = y.Flex3 and x.Crcy = y.Crcy and x.Co = y.Co and x.GL = y.GL and x.PC = y.PC and x.UWYR = y.UWYR
update TransX set Ledger = 'Z000'  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 = '60' and Ledger = '0L'
update TransX set Ledger = 'Z000'  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt2 = Amt3 and Amt2 = Amt4 and Amt2 = Amt5 and Ledger = '0L'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt2 = Amt3 and Amt2 = Amt4 and Amt2 = Amt5 and Ledger <> '0L' and Ledger <> 'Z000'
update TransX set Ledger = 'Z000'  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt2 = Amt3 and Amt2 = Amt4 and Ledger = '0L' and (Co like '1%' or Co like '26%' or Co like '41%')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt2 = Amt3 and Amt2 = Amt4 and Ledger <> '0L' and Ledger <> 'Z000' and (Co like '1%' or Co like '26%' or Co like '41%')
update TransX set Ledger = 'Z003'  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt3 = Amt4 and Amt3 = Amt5 and Ledger = 'IF'
delete  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt3 = Amt4 and Amt3 = Amt5 and Ledger in ('UG','US')
update TransX set Ledger = 'Z004'  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt3 = Amt4 and Ledger = 'IF'
delete  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt3 = Amt4 and Ledger = 'UG'

Insert into TransX (KeyID,Ledger,Co,Crcy,GL,PC,UWYR,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Flex3) (select KeyID,Ledger,Co,Crcy,GL,PC,UWYR,(case when Flex3 = '00' then Amt1 else 0 end),(case when Flex3 = '10' then Amt1 else 0 end),(case when Flex3 = '30' then Amt1 else 0 end),(case when Flex3 = '60' then Amt1 else 0 end),'pass1' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')

Insert into TransX (KeyID,Ledger,Co,Crcy,GL,PC,UWYR,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Txt,Flex3) (select KeyID,Ledger,Co,Crcy,GL,PC,UWYR,round(sum(Amt1),2),round(sum(Amt2),2),round(sum(amt3),2),round(sum(Amt4),2),'Bank Crcy Adj for ' + cast(GL as varchar(7)) + ' ' + Crcy as Txt,'pass2' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 = 'pass1' group by KeyID,Ledger,Co,Crcy,GL,PC,UWYR)
Delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Flex3 = 'pass2'
Insert into TransX (KeyID,Ledger,Co,Crcy,GL,PC,UWYR,Txt,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4) (select KeyID,Ledger,Co,Crcy,'1099900' as GL,PC,UWYR,Txt,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')
Update TransX set Amt1 = round(-Amt1,2), Amt2 = round(-Amt2,2), Amt3 = round(-Amt3,2), Amt4 = round(-Amt4,2) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL <> '1099900'

Insert into TransX (KeyID,Ledger,Co,Crcy,GL,PC,UWYR,Txt,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4) (select KeyID,Ledger,Co,'A99',GL,PC,UWYR,Txt,round(-Amt2,2),round(-Amt2,2),round(-Amt3,2),round(-Amt4,2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')
Update t set Crcy = c.Crcy from TransX t inner join Companies c on t.Co = c.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]' and t.Crcy = 'A99'

Insert into TransX (KeyID,Ledger,Co,Crcy,GL,PC,UWYR,Txt,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,PK) (select KeyID,Ledger,Co,Crcy,GL,PC,UWYR,Txt,(case when Amt1 > 0 then Amt1 else 0 end),(case when Amt2 > 0 then Amt2 else 0 end),(case when Amt3 > 0 then Amt3 else 0 end),(case when Amt4 > 0 then Amt4 else 0 end),'40' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL)

Insert into TransX (KeyID,Ledger,Co,Crcy,GL,PC,UWYR,Txt,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,PK) (select KeyID,Ledger,Co,Crcy,GL,PC,UWYR,Txt,(case when Amt1 < 0 then Amt1 else 0 end),(case when Amt2 < 0 then Amt2 else 0 end),(case when Amt3 < 0 then Amt3 else 0 end),(case when Amt4 < 0 then Amt4 else 0 end),'50' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL)
Delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0 and Amt4 = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID  = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = 'ZW' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
